message:
fix(coordinator): address code review issues

- Rename 'copy' variable to 'agentCopy' to avoid shadowing built-in
  copy function (coordinator.go)
- Rename 'status' variable to 'agentStatus' to avoid shadowing
  imported status package (monitor.go)
- Fix JSON tag inconsistency: InProgressTask -> InProgressTasks
  to match json:"in_progress_tasks" (digest.go)
- Replace inefficient recursive contains() with strings.Contains
  in test files (conflicts_test.go, assign_test.go)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
